title: Beyond the Skies
description: Minecraft 1.22, "The End Update" from my perspective.
body:
![Beyond the Skies logo.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5743ad7b7ae9519a94f249b91ec8d635549978a5.png)
-
### About
Minecraft 1.22 from my perspective, making the End feel a little alive while still maintaining the desolate dimension it was meant to be. The modpack adds things like new ores, biomes, structures, and makes the Ender Dragon much more harder than the vanilla game, making it worth calling it a boss fight, it also revamps the strongholds in the Overworld. Aside from End related things are making the Wither even challenging than the Ender Dragon. The modpack also runs on the latest versions of minecraft so you could get all the latest things from 1.21.10 and above.

### Note

This modpack is a concept for Minecraft 1.22 or "The End Update" and it may add more mods, so take this with a grain of salt.

Check the version tab for the mods and resource packs.
